start.sentence: Start in Ljubljana on day one.

spend.sentence: Spend time in the old town, by the river, and near the castle.

three.contextMeaning: The third day in the plan
three.sentence: On day three, go to Bohinj or another mountain area for fresh air and walking.

area.simpleMeaning: A place or part of a place
area.sentence: On day three, go to Bohinj or another mountain area for fresh air and walking.

four.contextMeaning: The fourth day in the plan
four.sentence: On day four, visit Postojna Cave or Škocjan Caves.

visit.simpleMeaning: Go to see a place or person
visit.contextMeaning: Go and look around the cave places
visit.sentence: On day four, visit Postojna Cave or Škocjan Caves.

finish.simpleMeaning: End something; be done at the end
finish.sentence: On day five, finish in Piran on the coast.

works.simpleMeaning: Is good and does the job
works.contextMeaning: This plan is good and makes sense
works.sentence: This route works because each day gives you a different scene.

each.contextMeaning: Every day has a different kind of place
each.sentence: This route works because each day gives you a different scene.

scene.simpleMeaning: What you see in a place
scene.contextMeaning: Every day shows a different kind of view
scene.sentence: This route works because each day gives you a different scene.

appear.contextMeaning: All these places are included in one plan
appear.sentence: City, lake, mountain, cave, and sea all appear in one plan.

helpful.contextMeaning: This is good for travelers who want many kinds of places
helpful.sentence: That is helpful for travelers who want variety without long, tiring journeys.

without.contextMeaning: You can have variety and not have long trips
without.sentence: That is helpful for travelers who want variety without long, tiring journeys.

long.sentence: That is helpful for travelers who want variety without long, tiring journeys.

tiring.simpleMeaning: Making your body feel very tired
tiring.contextMeaning: Making the trip feel hard and exhausting
tiring.sentence: That is helpful for travelers who want variety without long, tiring journeys.

journeys.simpleMeaning: Trips from one place to another
journeys.contextMeaning: Trips that take a lot of time and energy
journeys.sentence: That is helpful for travelers who want variety without long, tiring journeys.

means.simpleMeaning: Shows what something is or does
means.contextMeaning: This shows you can enjoy more and feel less stress
means.sentence: It also means you can enjoy more and pack less stress into the trip.

pack.simpleMeaning: Put things into a bag or box
pack.contextMeaning: Put too much worry into the trip
pack.sentence: It also means you can enjoy more and pack less stress into the trip.

stress.contextMeaning: Worry and pressure during the trip
stress.sentence: It also means you can enjoy more and pack less stress into the trip.

transport.simpleMeaning: Ways to move from place to place
transport.contextMeaning: Ways to travel that make visitors feel welcome
transport.sentence: Transport is another reason Slovenia feels friendly to visitors.

friendly.sentence: Transport is another reason Slovenia feels friendly to visitors.

train.simpleMeaning: A long vehicle that moves on tracks
train.contextMeaning: A way to travel from one place to another
train.sentence: Bus and train links make travel easier between many places.

links.contextMeaning: Roads or routes that connect places
links.sentence: Bus and train links make travel easier between many places.

make.sentence: Bus and train links make travel easier between many places.

between.simpleMeaning: In the middle of two things
between.contextMeaning: From one place to another place
between.sentence: Bus and train links make travel easier between many places.

rent.simpleMeaning: Pay to use something for a short time
rent.contextMeaning: Pay to use a car for a short time
rent.sentence: If you do not want to rent a car, that is possible on a short trip.

car.simpleMeaning: A small vehicle for driving on roads
car.contextMeaning: A vehicle you can use for travel
car.sentence: If you do not want to rent a car, that is possible on a short trip.

buses.simpleMeaning: Big vehicles that carry many people
buses.contextMeaning: Vehicles that go to many places
buses.sentence: Buses often reach more places than trains.

reach.sentence: Buses often reach more places than trains.

trains.simpleMeaning: Long vehicles that move on tracks
trains.contextMeaning: Vehicles that can go to many places
trains.sentence: Buses often reach more places than trains.

help.sentence: A car can help in rural areas, but it is not always necessary.

rural.simpleMeaning: Far from cities, with fields and small towns
rural.contextMeaning: In the countryside, not in a city
rural.sentence: A car can help in rural areas, but it is not always necessary.

areas.simpleMeaning: Parts of a place or land
areas.contextMeaning: Places in the countryside, not in a city
areas.sentence: A car can help in rural areas, but it is not always necessary.

always.contextMeaning: Not every time; sometimes a car is not needed
always.sentence: A car can help in rural areas, but it is not always necessary.

necessary.contextMeaning: A car is not always needed
necessary.sentence: A car can help in rural areas, but it is not always necessary.

public.contextMeaning: Transport everyone can use, like buses or trains
public.sentence: For many first-time visitors, public transport is enough.

enough.contextMeaning: Public transport is all they need
enough.sentence: For many first-time visitors, public transport is enough.

money.simpleMeaning: Coins and notes you use to buy things

cheapest.contextMeaning: Not the place with the lowest prices
cheapest.sentence: Slovenia is not the cheapest country in Europe, but it is also not extreme.

extreme.simpleMeaning: Very, very strong or far from normal
extreme.contextMeaning: Not very cheap, but also not very expensive
extreme.sentence: Slovenia is not the cheapest country in Europe, but it is also not extreme.

guesthouses.contextMeaning: Small, simple places to stay for visitors
guesthouses.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

mid-range.simpleMeaning: Not cheap, not expensive; in the middle
mid-range.contextMeaning: Hotels with medium prices and comfort
mid-range.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

hotels.simpleMeaning: Places where people sleep when away from home
hotels.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

meals.contextMeaning: Food you eat, often simple and not fancy
meals.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

common.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

options.simpleMeaning: Different things you can choose from
options.sentence: Guesthouses, mid-range hotels, and simple meals are common options.

eat.simpleMeaning: Put food in your mouth and swallow it
eat.sentence: If you eat well, but not too expensively, and use public transport, you can control your budget.

expensively.simpleMeaning: With a lot of money needed
expensively.sentence: If you eat well, but not too expensively, and use public transport, you can control your budget.

use.simpleMeaning: Do something with something you have
use.sentence: If you eat well, but not too expensively, and use public transport, you can control your budget.

budget.simpleMeaning: Money you can spend on things
budget.sentence: If you eat well, but not too expensively, and use public transport, you can control your budget.

costs.simpleMeaning: Money you must pay for something

rise.sentence: Costs rise if you choose lake hotels, car rental, and guided tours.

rental.simpleMeaning: Paying money to borrow something for a time
rental.contextMeaning: Getting a car by paying for it for a time
rental.sentence: Costs rise if you choose lake hotels, car rental, and guided tours.

guided.simpleMeaning: Led by a person who helps you
guided.contextMeaning: Led by a person who explains places
guided.sentence: Costs rise if you choose lake hotels, car rental, and guided tours.

tours.contextMeaning: Trips to visit and look at places
tours.sentence: Costs rise if you choose lake hotels, car rental, and guided tours.

food.sentence: Food in Slovenia is simple and filling.

filling.sentence: Food in Slovenia is simple and filling.

soups.simpleMeaning: Hot liquid food in a bowl
soups.contextMeaning: Warm bowl foods you can eat
soups.sentence: You may see soups, dumplings, sausages, cheese, and fresh bread.

dumplings.simpleMeaning: Small soft pieces of cooked dough
dumplings.contextMeaning: Soft little food pieces in the meal
dumplings.sentence: You may see soups, dumplings, sausages, cheese, and fresh bread.

sausages.simpleMeaning: Long meat food in a skin
sausages.contextMeaning: Meat foods you can eat with bread
sausages.sentence: You may see soups, dumplings, sausages, cheese, and fresh bread.

cheese.simpleMeaning: A soft or hard food made from milk
cheese.contextMeaning: A food people eat with bread or in meals
cheese.sentence: You may see soups, dumplings, sausages, cheese, and fresh bread.

bread.simpleMeaning: A food made from flour, often sliced
bread.contextMeaning: A soft food people eat with meals
bread.sentence: You may see soups, dumplings, sausages, cheese, and fresh bread.

seafood.simpleMeaning: Food from the sea, like fish or shellfish
seafood.contextMeaning: Food from the sea that people eat near the coast
seafood.sentence: On the coast, seafood is more common.

heavier.simpleMeaning: More hard to lift or carry
heavier.contextMeaning: Food that feels more filling and strong in the stomach
heavier.sentence: In the mountains, meals often feel heavier and warmer.

sense.simpleMeaning: A good idea that is easy to understand
sense.contextMeaning: It is easy to understand and seems right
sense.sentence: That makes sense, because climate shapes local food.

climate.simpleMeaning: The usual weather in a place
climate.contextMeaning: The weather in a place over a long time
climate.sentence: That makes sense, because climate shapes local food.

shapes.simpleMeaning: Helps make something look or be a certain way
shapes.contextMeaning: Helps decide what local food is like
shapes.sentence: That makes sense, because climate shapes local food.

local.simpleMeaning: From this place, not far away
local.contextMeaning: From the same place or area
local.sentence: That makes sense, because climate shapes local food.

coffee.simpleMeaning: A hot drink made from brown beans
coffee.contextMeaning: A hot drink people like to drink there
coffee.sentence: In Ljubljana, coffee culture is strong.

culture.simpleMeaning: The way people live, eat, and do things
culture.contextMeaning: People there like coffee and spend time with it
culture.sentence: In Ljubljana, coffee culture is strong.

caf.simpleMeaning: A place where people buy drinks and sit
caf.contextMeaning: A place where people sit, drink, and talk
caf.sentence: People sit in cafés and talk for a long time.

talk.contextMeaning: To speak with each other for a long time
talk.sentence: People sit in cafés and talk for a long time.

spring.contextMeaning: A good season to visit because it is less busy
spring.sentence: Spring and early autumn are often smart times to visit.

early.contextMeaning: At the start of a season or before others arrive
early.sentence: Spring and early autumn are often smart times to visit.

autumn.contextMeaning: A good season to visit because it is less busy
autumn.sentence: Spring and early autumn are often smart times to visit.

smart.simpleMeaning: Good to do; a good choice
smart.sentence: Spring and early autumn are often smart times to visit.

times.simpleMeaning: Parts of the day or year
times.contextMeaning: Parts of the year to visit
times.sentence: Spring and early autumn are often smart times to visit.

crowds.sentence: Crowds are smaller, and the weather is usually pleasant.

smaller.sentence: Crowds are smaller, and the weather is usually pleasant.

weather.simpleMeaning: Sun, rain, wind, or snow outside
weather.contextMeaning: How hot, cold, or nice the air is
weather.sentence: Crowds are smaller, and the weather is usually pleasant.

usually.sentence: Crowds are smaller, and the weather is usually pleasant.

pleasant.sentence: Crowds are smaller, and the weather is usually pleasant.

calmer.sentence: Popular places like Bled, Piran, and the famous caves can feel calmer outside summer.

outside.sentence: Popular places like Bled, Piran, and the famous caves can feel calmer outside summer.

enjoyable.sentence: That can make the trip more enjoyable.

book.contextMeaning: Reserve a place before others do
book.sentence: If you go in summer, book early because the best-known places can fill up fast.

fill.sentence: If you go in summer, book early because the best-known places can fill up fast.

fast.sentence: If you go in summer, book early because the best-known places can fill up fast.

lot.simpleMeaning: Many things or much of something
lot.sentence: So, Slovenia is a small country with a lot inside it.

inside.sentence: So, Slovenia is a small country with a lot inside it.

cities.simpleMeaning: Big places where many people live
cities.contextMeaning: Big towns in one trip with nature places
cities.sentence: You can see cities, lakes, mountains, caves, and the sea in one trip.

what.simpleMeaning: The thing that is being talked about
what.contextMeaning: The thing that makes it special
what.sentence: That is what makes it special.

dot.contextMeaning: The small mark in a website name
dot.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

com.contextMeaning: The ending part of the website address
com.sentence: If you want more simple English stories like this, visit ovi english dot com.

thanks.simpleMeaning: A nice way to show you are grateful
thanks.contextMeaning: A polite way to say you are grateful
thanks.sentence: Thanks for listening, and happy travels.

listening.simpleMeaning: Using your ears to hear someone
listening.sentence: Thanks for listening, and happy travels.

happy.sentence: Thanks for listening, and happy travels.

travels.simpleMeaning: Going from one place to another
travels.sentence: Thanks for listening, and happy travels.

opening.simpleMeaning: The first part at the start
opening.contextMeaning: The start part of the program

news.contextMeaning: A report about a place and its features
news.sentence: [NEWS STORY] Slovenia is a small country in Central Europe, but it feels full of variety.

story.sentence: [NEWS STORY] Slovenia is a small country in Central Europe, but it feels full of variety.

practice.simpleMeaning: Doing something again to get better
practice.contextMeaning: An activity to help learners think and answer
practice.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Why do many first-time visitors choose Slovenia?

question.contextMeaning: A sentence asking learners to think and answer
question.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Why do many first-time visitors choose Slovenia?

why.contextMeaning: Asking for the reason something happens
why.sentence: [PRACTICE] QUESTION: Why do many first-time visitors choose Slovenia?

answer.simpleMeaning: What you say back to a question
answer.contextMeaning: The reply that explains the reason
answer.sentence: ANSWER: Because it offers mountains, lakes, caves, and a coast in one small country.

hiking.simpleMeaning: Walking far in nature for fun
hiking.contextMeaning: Walking in hills or mountains for fun
hiking.sentence: ANSWER: It has cooler summers, good hiking, and lake views.

fewer.simpleMeaning: Not as many; a smaller number
fewer.contextMeaning: There are not as many people there
fewer.sentence: ANSWER: Spring or early autumn, because there are fewer crowds.

closing.simpleMeaning: The last part at the end
closing.contextMeaning: The final part of the talk
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] So, Slovenia is a small country with a lot inside it.
